name: Taste of the Orient Vegetables
recipeIngredient: 1 can VEG-ALL Mixed Vegetables, drained (16 oz)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the corn oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Add garlic and red pepper; sauté for 2 minutes.
2. Stir in bean sprouts, green onions, ginger, VEG-ALL vegetables, and chicken broth. Cook until the vegetables are tender, about 3-5 minutes.
3. Pour in the dry sherry, soy sauce, sugar, and mix well with the vegetable mixture.
4. In a separate bowl, dissolve cornstarch in water. Stir into the hot vegetable mixture and cook until thickened.
5. Turn off the heat and serve over rice or noodles.
